disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive profound fatigue and lethargy over six months, culminating in an acute inability to perform basic daily activities today
trigger_question_examples: What's been happening with your energy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about six months my energy has been draining away, and today I just couldn't get going at all — my spouse had to do everything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe hot flushes multiple times a day for the last two weeks (vasomotor symptoms)
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the hot flushes.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I keep getting these intense hot flushes out of nowhere, several times a day for the last couple of weeks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete loss of libido and severe erectile dysfunction over the same six-month period
trigger_question_examples: Has there been any change in your interest in sex or sexual function?
Some men notice changes in this area with these symptoms — has that happened for you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly... yes. I've completely lost interest in sex and things haven't been working at all for months. It's hard to talk about.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not get into that side of things.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Noticeable loss of muscle mass and strength
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in your muscles or strength?
Do your arms or legs feel weaker or smaller than they used to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My muscles feel weaker and look smaller than they used to.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Loss of axillary and pubic hair, noticed by the spouse
trigger_question_examples: Have you or your spouse noticed any change in body hair?
Any thinning of underarm or body hair?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spouse says I've lost a lot of the hair under my arms and around my groin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent depressed mood, emptiness and markedly impaired concentration
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping emotionally with all this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely empty and depressed, and I can't concentrate on anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Screen for thoughts of self-harm, overwhelming despair or hopelessness given the mood change and relationship strain
trigger_question_examples: Sometimes when people feel this low they have thoughts of harming themselves or that life isn't worth living — have you had any thoughts like that?
Have things ever felt so overwhelming that you've thought about ending it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't had any plans to hurt myself, but I do feel hopeless and I don't know how much more of this I can take.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to talk about that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular prescribed medications; denies anabolic steroid use or recent opioid therapy
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any medications, supplements, steroids or strong painkillers?
Have you ever used anabolic steroids or been on long-term opioids?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No regular medications at all. No steroids, and I haven't been on any strong painkillers.
